texts.orig: Ol Tukai Lodge offers a unique wedding experience in the wild, for love is the greatest adventure and marriage is a celebration of love and friendship.
texts.text: Ol Tukai Lodge offers a unique wedding experience in the wild, for love is the greatest adventure and marriage is a celebration of love and friendship.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR A WEDDING IN KENYA
texts.text: DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR A WEDDING IN KENYA

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The documentation outlined below will be required for your wedding in Kenya.  Please note that complete and clear photocopies of the documents will be required no later than 10 weeks prior to travel. Fax copies are not accepted.
texts.text: The documentation outlined below will be required for your wedding in Kenya.  Please note that complete and clear photocopies of the documents will be required no later than 10 weeks prior to travel. Fax copies are not accepted.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If documents are not received by this deadline we may not have enough time to complete the necessary arrangements.
texts.text: If documents are not received by this deadline we may not have enough time to complete the necessary arrangements.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PLEASE RETURN CHECK LIST WITH ALL RELEVANT DOCUMENTS
texts.text: PLEASE RETURN CHECK LIST WITH ALL RELEVANT DOCUMENTS

texts.label: checkbox_unselected
texts.orig: Passport with a minimum of 6 months' validity.
texts.text: Passport with a minimum of 6 months' validity.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Birth certificates (both short and long certificates are acceptable).
texts.text: Birth certificates (both short and long certificates are acceptable).

texts.label: checkbox_unselected
texts.orig: Full address of your country of residence for both individuals.
texts.text: Full address of your country of residence for both individuals.

texts.label: checkbox_unselected
texts.orig: Details of occupation for both individuals.
texts.text: Details of occupation for both individuals.

texts.label: checkbox_unselected
texts.orig: Fathers' names (Full names, address and occupation).
texts.text: Fathers' names (Full names, address and occupation).

texts.label: checkbox_unselected
texts.orig: If either of you are divorced, proof of the Decree Absolute is required.  This document must clearly show the Court stamp.
texts.text: If either of you are divorced, proof of the Decree Absolute is required.  This document must clearly show the Court stamp.

texts.label: checkbox_unselected
texts.orig: If either of you are widowed, the former marriage certificate and death certificate of the spouse will be required.
texts.text: If either of you are widowed, the former marriage certificate and death certificate of the spouse will be required.

texts.label: checkbox_unselected
texts.orig: If either of you have changed names by deed poll, you must provide proof that the process was duly followed.
texts.text: If either of you have changed names by deed poll, you must provide proof that the process was duly followed.

texts.label: checkbox_unselected
texts.orig: If either of you have been adopted, adoption papers will be required.
texts.text: If either of you have been adopted, adoption papers will be required.

texts.label: checkbox_unselected
texts.orig: An affidavit stating that neither of you have been married previously or that you have been married and divorced (see above if divorced or widowed).  This must be prepared in your country prior to travel.
texts.text: An affidavit stating that neither of you have been married previously or that you have been married and divorced (see above if divorced or widowed).  This must be prepared in your country prior to travel.

texts.label: checkbox_unselected
texts.orig: Any relevant documentation you hold which is in any language other than English must be officially translated and be accompanied by the original.
texts.text: Any relevant documentation you hold which is in any language other than English must be officially translated and be accompanied by the original.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: NOTE: You must carry all the original copies of aforementioned documents.
texts.text: NOTE: You must carry all the original copies of aforementioned documents.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Head Office: Off Rhapta Road, Westlands P.O. Box 45403 - 00100, Nairobi-Kenya. Phone: +254 721 363 163
texts.text: Head Office: Off Rhapta Road, Westlands P.O. Box 45403 - 00100, Nairobi-Kenya. Phone: +254 721 363 163
